Evidence retrieval and question answering directly support tutoring and knowledge-work workflows.
User-facing tutoring and translation systems need human evaluation; support is broad rather than exact.
BERT supports language understanding, but encoder-only transformers are not a general common dependency for all tutoring/translation systems.
Long documents and knowledge work make context compression a plausible optional dependency.
Provenance can be useful for educational or knowledge-work outputs, but cited sources do not establish it as a general dependency.
